news.headline: PALESTINE RED CRESCENT SOCIETY PRESIDENT: WE HAVE ALREADY APPROACHED INTERNATIONAL COURTS ABOUT KILLING OF AID WORKERS IN GAZA IN MARCH

news.summary: In CAESAREA, Israel, Delta Galil Industries, Ltd. announced its financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company, known for designing and producing branded and private label apparel for all genders and ages, reported a remarkable 11% increase in first quarter sales, reaching a record high of $498.7 million. This growth was attributed to positive performance across all segments and distribution channels, including a notable rise in online sales.
news.headline: Delta Galil had record first quarter results in 2025, with sales up 11% to $498.7 million, driven by growth in all segments and online channels.

news.summary: In Redmond, Washington, a new chapter of the FANTASY LIFE series is launching this week for the Nintendo Switch. Titled FANTASY LIFE i: The Girl Who Steals Time, players can select from 14 unique roles known as "Lives," switch classes freely, and delve into a mysterious new island. The game offers the opportunity to construct a town in the present timeline and venture into the past, all while interacting with familiar characters and discovering the secrets of the island's ruins. This Nintendo Download features this content for purchase on the Nintendo eShop.
news.headline: New game "Fantasy Life i: The Girl Who Steals Time" released on Nintendo Switch, with 14 roles to choose from. #NintendoSwitch

Zelenskyy: 'Spoke with the President of Serbia Aleksandar Vučić. Discussed topical issues – our European integration and bilateral cooperation. In particular, we talked about interaction in the Ukraine – South-Eastern Europe format. We will develop it so that its effectiveness
MESSY DEMOCRATIC PRIMARIES COULD HURT PARTY’S CHANCES OF RETAKING THE HOUSE – POLITICO
BoE's Pill: 'Flexibility and agility' needed in the face of big shifts.

news.summary: In Geneva, Switzerland on May 22, 2025, SEALSQ has revealed the MS6003 Secure Element integrated with a preloaded FIDO2 application. This advancement aims to expedite passwordless authentication systems in a world that prioritizes zero-trust security measures.
news.headline: SEALSQ introduces MS6003 Secure Element with FIDO2 app, enabling passwordless authentication in a zero-trust world.

news.summary: VGtel, Inc., a company trading under the stock symbol VGTL, has recently entered into a Letter of Intent with an elementary school in Arizona. The collaboration signifies the initiation of a pioneering astronomy pilot program tailored specifically for youth. Scheduled to commence in the fall of 2025, the program aims to engage and educate young learners about the wonders of the universe. This partnership is anticipated to bring forth an innovative educational experience, with VGtel leading the initiative.
news.headline: VGTEL, Inc. (OTC: VGTL) to launch astronomy program in Arizona elementary school in Fall 2025.

news.summary: In Reno, Nevada, on May 22, 2025, Nevada Canyon Gold Corp. (OTCQX: NGLD) announced the commencement of the 2025 reverse circulation (“RC”) drill program at the Lapon Canyon Project. Nevada Canyon holds a 3% Net Smelter Royalty (“NSR”) and an Exploration Stream Earn-in Agreement for the Project. Walker River Resources Corp. (“Walker River”) (TSX.V: WRR) owns the Project with 96 unpatented lode claims within the Walker Lane gold trend, located around 40 miles southeast of Yerington, Nevada.
news.headline: Drill program starts at Lapon Canyon, owned by Nevada Canyon Gold Corp, with 3% NSR. Walker River Resources owns 100% interest.

news.summary: A technology leader and expert in immersive media has recently joined the Board to assist with strategic expansion and digital infrastructure projects. This addition brings valuable skills and experience to support the company's growth objectives.
news.headline: Safe and Green Holdings appoints Samarth Verma to Board of Directors for strategic growth and digital infrastructure initiatives.

news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, on May 22, 2025, Micropolis Holding Co. introduced cutting-edge autonomous systems at the Make it in the Emirates 2025 event in Abu Dhabi. Micropolis, a leader in unmanned ground vehicles and AI security solutions, presented their innovative technologies at Booth 6-AM30 in the Micropolis Pavilion at the Abu Dhabi National Exhibition Centre (ADNEC). This unveiling at the industrial innovation event showcased a range of advanced autonomous systems, demonstrating the company's prowess in this sector to attendees. The event served as a platform for Micropolis to exhibit its capabilities in the field, highlighting their commitment to technological advancement and innovation in the industry.
news.headline: Micropolis showcases advanced robotics at Make it in the Emirates 2025 event. Displayed at Booth 6-AM30, these autonomous systems aim to revolutionize industrial innovation.

news.summary: Dublin - A recent report on the Perforating Gun Market reveals that it is expected to expand significantly in the coming years. The market, segmented by gun type including Through Tubing Hollow Carrier & Exposed, Wireline Conveyed Casing, and TCP, as well as by well type (horizontal, vertical), depth (up to 3,000 ft, 3,001-8,000 ft, above 8,000 ft), pressure, application, and region, is anticipated to reach a value of USD 1.48 billion by 2030. This marks notable growth from its estimated value of USD 1.19 billion in 2025, exhibiting a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4%.
news.headline: Global perforating gun market expected to reach $1.48B by 2030, with a projected CAGR of 4%. Market currently estimated at $1.19B.
PALESTINE RED CRESCENT SOCIETY PRESIDENT: AMBULANCE CAPACITY IN GAZA DOWN TO ONE THIRD, ALL GASOLINE AMBULANCES STOPPED

news.summary: BJ's Wholesale Club Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BJ) saw an uptick in premarket trading following the release of their first-quarter results. They reported adjusted earnings per share of $1.14, surpassing the analyst prediction of 92 cents. Despite quarterly revenues totaling $5.15 billion, marking a 4.7% increase from the previous year, it fell short of the expected $5.20 billion. Comparable club sales also showed a positive trend, climbing 1.6% year-over-year. Excluding gasoline, sales experienced a 3.9% growth, attributable to increased customer footfall. Operating income for the quarter surged by 26.7% compared to the same period last year. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: BJ's Wholesale (BJ) stock rises on Thursday after Q1 report: EPS $1.14 (beat $0.92 est.), revenue $5.15B (+4.7% YoY), comp sales +1.6%.
PALESTINE RED CRESCENT SOCIETY PRESIDENT: GAZA AID WORKER WHO SURVIVED LETHAL SHOOTING IN MARCH WILL 'DESTROY' ISRAELI VERSION OF EVENTS

news.summary: Bitcoin mining stocks Mara Holdings Inc (NASDAQ: MARA), Riot Platforms Inc (NASDAQ: RIOT), and CleanSpark Inc (NASDAQ: CLSK) are experiencing an uptick in trading as bitcoin reaches new record highs. Bitcoin hit all-time highs on Wednesday and has continued to rise, currently around $111,235, up about 4.25% over a 24-hour period. Inflows into bitcoin ETFs have been increasing, with a net inflow of $6.63 billion recorded across bitcoin ETFs in the past five weeks, as reported by Santiment. Bitcoin's recent momentum in May may be attributed to various factors, including a resurgence in risk assets as the broader markets recover from the lows seen in April.
news.headline: Bitcoin mining stocks like MARA Holdings, Riot, and CleanSpark are surging as Bitcoin hits new highs. Bitcoin is up 4.25% to $111,235, with $6.63 billion inflow into Bitcoin ETFs in the last 5 weeks.

news.summary: ITS Logistics released the May ITS Supply Chain Report, stating that the down freight market and tariff volatility are causing high market turnover. Carrier exits hit a 12-month high, while new carrier authorities rose by 48% monthly and 30% yearly. Rates for reefer and dry vans had slight changes due to soft demand in industries like food service and home construction. The U.S. and China agreeing to lower tariffs led importers to ship cargo urgently, causing ocean carriers to potentially increase rates by up to 50%. Major carriers quoted rates for sailings at about $900 per TEU higher than the previous week. Despite rising container rates, a rebound in Chinese import volume is anticipated.
news.headline: Supply chain report by ITS Logistics: Carrier exits at 12-month high, new authorities up 48% m-o-m, reflecting market turnover in May 2025.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, in Vancouver, British Columbia and West Palm Beach, FL, AgriFORCE Growing Systems Ltd. (NASDAQ: AGRI) revealed that CEO Jolie Kahn will be a speaker at Bitcoin 2025. The event, which is renowned for its focus on Bitcoin innovation and infrastructure, is a key platform for industry professionals. AgriFORCE, a tech and infrastructure firm specializing in agricultural and digital energy advancements, appears enthusiastic about this opportunity to engage with the Bitcoin community on a global scale.
news.headline: CEO Jolie Kahn from AGRIForce will speak at Bitcoin 2025 Conference, focusing on agricultural and digital energy innovation.

news.summary: During the initial quarter of 2025, the net revenue reached 469.4 thousand euros, indicating a notable increase of 24.1% from the same period in 2024. Profit before taxes also saw growth, standing at 34.8 thousand euros, which marks an increase of 5.1 thousand euros compared to the first quarter of the previous year.
news.headline: JSC reports 469.4K euros in net turnover, up by 24.1% from last year, with a profit before taxes of 34.8K euros.
PERSON SHOT BY SECURITY GUARDS OUTSIDE CIA HEADQUARTERS IN VIRGINIA - REPORTS
ZS recognized as a Leader in Customer Analytics Services Providers Evaluation by Forrester Wave report Q2 2025.

news.summary: In New York, DoubleVerify (NYSE: DV), a top digital media measurement and analytics platform, has released advice through its Transparency Center to assist advertisers in managing the increase in scams targeting ads.txt. This standard allows publishers and platforms to disclose approved digital inventory sellers. The DV Fraud Lab has found over 100 instances of ads.txt manipulation since its introduction in May 2017.
news.headline: DoubleVerify warns of ads.txt exploits, identifies over 100 cases since May 2017. Ads.txt used by publishers to declare sellers.

news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut, a recent report by ISG reveals that enterprises are increasingly collaborating with HR outsourcing (HRO) providers to integrate artificial intelligence (AI) and analytics into their operations. This strategic move aims to enhance employee experience and overall performance within organizations. The adoption of AI and analytics technologies is becoming more prevalent as companies strive to optimize their workforce efficiency. This trend highlights a growing interest in leveraging innovative solutions to drive productivity and enhance employee satisfaction.
news.headline: HR outsourcing services now using AI & analytics for improved employee experience; ISG reports increased collaboration between enterprises & HRO providers.

news.summary: In Portland, Oregon, new features in the Airship Experience Platform now allow for the creation of highly personalized, interactive experiences without needing to code. These capabilities enable the delivery of dynamic experiences that adjust in real-time to meet individual consumer preferences.
news.headline: Airship introduces new features allowing for personalized experiences, boosting agility in cross-channel customer interactions.

news.summary: In St. Louis, Belden Inc. (NYSE: BDC), a prominent global provider of comprehensive connection solutions, has unveiled its 2024 Sustainability Report: At the Crossroads of Technology and Sustainability. The report showcases the company's noteworthy progress in attaining its environmental, social, and governance targets. In 2021, Belden established 12 distinct sustainability goals to accomplish by 2025. The current report outlines the company's advancements towards these goals.
news.headline: Belden Inc. releases 2024 Sustainability Report, detailing progress towards 12 goals set in 2021.

news.summary: A company based in Mountain View, California is assisting businesses in dealing with the complexities of tariffs through the utilization of decision intelligence. Using this technology, they are able to evaluate, simulate, plan, and enhance automated decisions for companies.
news.headline: Aera Technology launches Decision Intelligence Skill to assist companies in managing tariff complexity.

news.summary: Leading developer of assured autonomous flight technology for fixed-wing aircraft, Merlin, has recently obtained an Experimental Certificate of Airworthiness from the Civil Aviation Authority of New Zealand (CAANZ). This certificate will allow Merlin to carry out certification flight tests of its autonomy platform in New Zealand. This development marks a significant milestone in the company’s journey towards becoming the first in the world to achieve certification for a complete takeoff to touchdown process.
news.headline: Merlin gets Experimental Certificate of Airworthiness in New Zealand for certification flight testing, a key step in its goals.

news.summary: Lightshift Energy, a prominent energy storage projects developer, will construct Vermont's biggest battery project at GlobalFoundries' semiconductor plant in Essex Junction. The project, having finished permitting and contracting, will commence construction in the current year and is scheduled to be operational in early 2026. This initiative showcases a futuristic strategy in incorporating battery innovation within a large-scale setting.
news.headline: Lightshift Energy to build largest battery storage project in Vermont for GlobalFoundries' semiconductor facility. Set to be online in early 2026.

news.summary: AI-powered advertising technology company Smartly revealed today that it has successfully integrated Reddit into its unified platform based in New York.
news.headline: Smartly integrates Reddit into its AI-powered advertising platform, enhancing services for clients.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Watershed Health has revealed a groundbreaking healthcare initiative in partnership with providers in Travis County. This initiative aims to revolutionize patient care by connecting providers to a unified health record system for the first time. This system will facilitate real-time patient insights, allowing for improved care coordination. The initiative seeks to enhance healthcare quality and access in the region, ultimately benefiting patient outcomes.
news.headline: Watershed Health launches healthcare collaboration in Austin-Travis County to enhance patient care coordination with single health record.

news.summary: Analog Devices, Inc (NASDAQ: ADI) saw its shares rise in premarket trading following the release of its fiscal second-quarter results. The company reported a 22% year-on-year increase in quarterly revenue to $2.64 billion, surpassing the analyst consensus estimate of $2.51 billion. Adjusted earnings per share (EPS) of $1.85 also exceeded the analyst consensus estimate of $1.70. Within their revenue segments, Industrial revenue grew by 16.8% to $1.16 billion, Automotive revenue saw a 24.2% increase to $849.51 million, Consumer revenue grew by 29.7% to $317.76 million, and Communications revenue increased by 32.1%. This positive performance comes amidst China imposing tariffs on US-made chips, with certain exemptions pertaining to those outsourced to Taiwan Semiconductor. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Analog Devices sees continued growth with 22% revenue increase to $2.64 billion in Q2. Shares trading higher premarket.
BoE's Pill: There is a case for making CPI forecasts less prominent.

news.summary: Haorui's expanding presence is introducing HiFi sequencing to a wider range of customers such as hospital laboratories and regional blood centers. This move has enabled a significant increase in the adoption of this advanced technology by the inclusion of new customers.
news.headline: PacBio expands distribution in China via Haorui Gene to reach new customers in hospital labs and blood centers.

news.summary: Concentrix has introduced the iX Hero™, a suite of AI-powered applications that aim to address significant challenges in customer experience. The launch of iX Hero™ signifies Concentrix's proactive approach to improving customer satisfaction and resolving key pain points. This agentic AI platform offers innovative solutions to enhance the customer experience, with features designed to streamline operations and boost efficiency. By leveraging cutting-edge technology, Concentrix aims to revolutionize customer service by providing tailor-made solutions that cater to the specific needs of clients. The iX Hero™ suite consists of a range of applications that harness the power of artificial intelligence to optimize processes and enhance customer interactions. This launch represents a major step forward in the quest to enhance customer satisfaction and deliver exceptional service.
news.headline: Concentrix introduces iX Hero™ agentic AI apps to address customer experience challenges.

news.summary: In Troy, Michigan, new-vehicle retail sales saw a 1.1% increase in May, according to J.D. Power. This rise comes as the rush to showrooms driven by tariffs slows down. Consumers set a record with their spending in May, reflecting a strong market despite the tapering rush.
news.headline: New-vehicle retail sales increased by 1.1% in May, with consumers spending a record amount for the month.

news.summary: Loveland, Ohio - SpeedPro, a prominent supplier of top-notch large-format printing and visual graphics, revealed the grand reopening of its Cincinnati East studio under fresh family management. The studio, now run by a trio comprising father Kelly, mother Julie, and son Drew Lowry, has shifted to a new site. They aim to combine technical expertise with innovative design to assist enterprises in East Cincinnati. The reinvigorated studio underscores their commitment to providing quality services.
news.headline: SpeedPro Cincinnati East Studio, under new family ownership, has reopened in Loveland. Operated by Drew, Kelly, and Julie Lowry, the studio emphasizes technical excellence and creative design to aid businesses in East Cincinnati.

news.summary: In Toronto, KAYAK and Affirm have extended their partnership into Canada, having already collaborated successfully in the U.S. since January 2023. Affirm, listed on NASDAQ as AFRM, provides a payment network that aids consumer empowerment and merchant growth. This move coincides with the start of the summer travel rush, allowing Canadian consumers to plan and pay for their trips over time. This alliance is a strategic step for KAYAK, the top travel search engine globally, and Affirm, and aims to offer Canadian consumers flexible payment options for their travel expenses.
news.headline: KAYAK and Affirm expand partnership into Canada for travel payment options. Success in U.S. since Jan 2023.

news.summary: In Seattle, Vouched, a prominent AI-powered identity verification company, introduced new initiatives to establish a basis of robust identity and trust for the emerging AI Software Agents industry. One key feature is the Agent Reputation Directory, a pioneering solution aimed at filling the vital void in identity verification for autonomous software agents. This initiative focuses on distinguishing reliable agents from unreliable ones. As AI agents play a growing role in digital workflows, the need for trustworthy identities becomes more crucial.
news.headline: Vouched launches "Know Your Agent" for AI verification, including Agent Reputation Directory. Strengthening trust for AI agents.

news.summary: A renowned Group Purchasing Organization (GPO) named CoreTrust recently revealed the winners of its prestigious 2025 Supplier Awards at the Supplier Summit event held in Orlando, Florida from April 28-30, 2025. With over 3,500 business clients, CoreTrust organized this gathering to acknowledge supplier achievements in categories like innovation, collaboration, and growth. The assembly was a combination of CoreTrust suppliers, private equity entities, and CoreTrust staff commemorating exceptional performances in the midst of market uncertainties where values beyond product and price reign.
news.headline: CoreTrust recognizes top suppliers at 2025 Supplier Summit in Orlando. Over 3,500 businesses trust GPO, highlighting innovation and growth.
BP HIRES GOLDMAN SACHS TO SELL CASTROL - RTRS $BP $GS

news.summary: Thryv Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:THRY), a leading small business software platform provider, revealed plans for executive management to conduct 1:1 meetings at two imminent investor conferences. The first is the Craig-Hallum 22nd Annual Institutional Investor Conference on May 28, 2025, in Minneapolis, MN. The second event is the William Blair 45th Annual Growth Stock Conference on June 3, 2025, in Chicago, IL. The presentation at the latter conference is scheduled for 4 PM.
news.headline: Thryv to host 1:1 meetings at Craig-Hallum conference on May 28, 2025 in Minneapolis, and at William Blair conference on June 3, 2025 in Chicago - Dallas-based company specializing in small business software - Date: Tuesday, June 3, 2025 - Location: Chicago, IL - Presentation: 4.

news.summary: In New York, Triton Digital®, a renowned technology and services provider for digital audio, podcast, and broadcast radio sectors, revealed the April 2025 reporting period data (March 31, 2025 – April 27, 2025) for its U.S. Podcast Ranker, assessed through Triton’s Podcast Metrics measurement tool. The BBC has newly entered the U.S. Podcast Ranker this month. Furthermore, iHeart Audience Network maintained its lead by securing the top position on the Top Sales Networks Report for the current month.
news.headline: Triton Digital releases April 2025 U.S. Podcast Ranker, iHeart Audience Network holds #1 spot, BBC joins ranker.

news.summary: In New York, a global technology transformation specialist, CI&T (NYSE: CINT), has published a new report titled "Patient-Centric Data Collection: 5 Findings and Opportunities for Every Healthcare Provider." This report sheds light on a trust gap in patient data handling, emphasizing opportunities to enhance the healthcare experience. It reveals crucial findings that underscore the necessity for a patient-focused, transparent strategy towards data collection and management. The report stresses the significance of trust in data accuracy and suggests a shift towards more patient-driven approaches.
news.headline: CI&T released report on patient-centric data collection, highlighting trust gap in patient data handling, with opportunities for improvement in healthcare.

news.summary: Emburse, a leading provider of travel and expense management solutions, has unveiled the Emburse Partner Community comprising 140 partners worldwide. This initiative demonstrates Emburse's dedication to collaborating with various sectors such as financial services firms, travel management companies, SaaS platforms, ERP ecosystems, and business marketplaces. The aim is to revolutionize organizational operations for over --- organizations through this extensive network of partners.
news.headline: Emburse launches Emburse Partner Community with 140 global partners to bring transformative travel and expense solutions.

news.summary: NuVista AI, a rapidly expanding company in the software and services sector assisting startups and SMBs in developing and expanding AI solutions, has appointed Bimal Tandel as the new CEO. Tandel brings with him more than 20 years of experience in Data and AI, having worked with major international corporations and thriving startups. Tandel has previously served in executive positions at Amazon Web Services and Accenture, and has been instrumental in the growth of pioneering companies such as Cloudera, Relus Cloud, and Cloudreach.
news.headline: NuVista AI names Bimal Tandel as CEO, unveils AIHouse Software to fast-track AI deployments, with Tandel's 20+ yrs experience.

news.summary: Santa Monica-based GoodRx (Nasdaq: GDRX) has revealed plans to introduce a new service called GoodRx Community Link for independent community pharmacies by June 2025. This offering will allow these pharmacies to establish direct contracts with GoodRx for pricing and oversee their involvement in the Integrated Savings Programs (ISP). Through cost-plus models, these contracts will enable locally owned and operated pharmacies to benefit from the platform's medication savings services. GoodRx continues to expand its services in the U.S. healthcare market.
news.headline: GoodRx to launch GoodRx Community Link for local pharmacies in June 2025, allowing direct contracts on pricing.

news.summary: In San Francisco, the Downtown Volunteer Coalition (DVC) has welcomed Crusoe, FleishmanHillard, the Golden State Warriors, Google, and the San Francisco Giants to its initiative. The DVC members recently collaborated for street cleanup and beautification efforts in various downtown neighborhoods of San Francisco. The partnership with HandsOn Bay Area, Refuse Refuse, San Francisco Recreation and Parks Department, Swords to Plowshares, and Glide saw volunteers working on community projects. This comes after the coalition's formation and aims at promoting volunteerism and community engagement.
news.headline: Downtown Volunteer Coalition gains support from major companies like Crusoe, FleishmanHillard, Golden State Warriors, Google, and San Francisco Giants to revitalize San Francisco. Street cleanup projects involve members partnering with local organizations.

news.summary: A company based in San Francisco, WellTheory, which specializes in whole-person care for autoimmune conditions, revealed today that it has secured $5 million in new funding. Alongside this, the company has effectively implemented its exclusive AI tools, Care Hub and Care Scribe, throughout its care services. The funding round saw the participation of new investors such as Samsung Next, Opal Ventures, and Up2 Fund, in addition to the continued backing from existing investors including Accel, OVO Fund, and BoxGroup. These achievements signify a significant advancement in the company's objective to enhance support and treatment for autoimmune diseases.
news.headline: WellTheory secured $5M funding to launch AI-powered Care Platform for autoimmune care, with new investors.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Curative Health Insurance Company has introduced Curative Telehealth, an innovative virtual health care service that costs nothing to access.
news.headline: Curative Health launches Curative Telehealth, a $0 virtual health care service, revolutionizing virtual healthcare.

news.summary: A nonprofit organization, Eckerd Connects, which operates across 21 states, has selected Michael D. Smith as its new President and CEO starting from June 16. Smith, who grew up in challenging circumstances with young parents in a low-income area, benefited greatly from the support of his local Boys & Girls Club. His appointment signifies a full circle as he now leads an organization dedicated to assisting youth, families, and job seekers. Smith's personal experience has fueled his dedication to supporting others in need.
news.headline: Michael D. Smith becomes President and CEO of Eckerd Connects, a nonprofit in 21 states, effective June 16. Youth advocate with inspiring background.
